decisions.decision: Build dashboard UI first, cloud sync API stubs second
decisions.rationale: API spec for doctor-toolbox.com not yet available; dashboard has no external dependency

decisions.decision: GPU optimization deferred — llama-server binary ephemeral in /tmp
decisions.rationale: Binary disappears across sessions since /tmp is not persisted. Optimization needs a permanent install location.

decisions.decision: Phase 5 scope: analytics dashboard + integration functions (not just cloud sync)
decisions.rationale: User explicitly requested dashboard UI and interaction functions beyond the ROADMAP SYNC-01/02

next_action: Resume Phase 5 plan: design analytics dashboard (clinic_daily_log, patient_conversations, auto_skills tables → chart data), then build base template + shared nav. API spec for cloud sync TBD.
context_notes: Explore agent has fully mapped the codebase. Key findings: 5 existing templates (Bootstrap 5, Traditional Chinese, no shared nav), auth is stub (X-Staff-ID), clinic.db has clinic_daily_log/clinic_info/auto_skills/patient_conversations tables perfect for analytics. Phase 5 user want = dashboard with analytics + interaction functions (not just SYNC). Cloud sync blocked on API spec. Plan mode was entered but not completed when /gsd-pause-work was invoked.
